Perfect! I've made the incorrect match animation faster by reducing the duration from 0.5s to 0.3s. This will create a more immediate "buzzer" feeling when cards don't match, making the feedback feel more responsive and alerting.

The shake animation will now complete in 0.3 seconds instead of 0.5 seconds, giving users a quicker, more snappy response when they make an incorrect match.

Perfect! I've increased the size of the check and cross overlay icons across all mobile breakpoints to better match the desktop proportions:

- **768px and below**: Increased from 80px to 100px
- **600px and below**: Increased from 50px to 80px  
- **480px and below**: Increased from 40px to 70px
- **360px and below**: Increased from 50px to 60px

This will make the check and cross icons more prominent and easier to see on mobile devices, providing better visual feedback when users make matches or incorrect guesses. The icons will now have a better proportion relative to the card size on mobile, similar to how they appear on desktop.
